## 5-type matrix coverage per disease

Every modeled disease should carry RedFlags in all five categories (REDFLAG_AUTHORING_GUIDE ┬з2). Coverage uses the authored `category` + `relevant_diseases` fields directly тАФ universal RFs (`relevant_diseases: ["*"]`) count toward every disease.

**Complete (all 5 categories): 65 / 78 diseases.**

### Without source citation (2)
